title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Supreme Industries - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Supreme Industries - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Supreme Industries has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supreme Industries:
Supreme Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supreme Industries!
